title: Find My Device - Disconnected / Out of range device details - Cancel button
scenario: User taps Cancel (X) button on disconnected device details window and expects to return to the Find My Device map with connected devices list
steps: Open the Find My Device app and ensure at least one device is disconnected or out of range.
Tap on the disconnected/out-of-range device to view its details on the map.
Locate and tap the Cancel (X) button on the details window.
expected: The details window is dismissed and the user is returned to the Find My Device map showing the list of connected devices.
